Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition and Subscription for 60% of Gold Meridian Technologies Limited (HK Main Board-listed) by Harbour Peak Capital SPC – Fund I SP.
Buyer: Harbour Peak Capital SPC – Fund I SP (managed by Port Jade Asset Management (Asia) Limited, SFC CE No. BZZ123); Seller: Prosper Dragon Holdings Limited (CR No. 3123456; BR No. 67654321-000-01-01-5).
Target: Gold Meridian Technologies Limited, Hong Kong incorporated, registered office at Unit 1203, 12/F, South Quays Tower, 88 King Wan Road, Kowloon, Hong Kong.
Structure: Purchase of 120,000,000 existing shares and subscription for 80,000,000 new shares; post-completion holding approximately 60%.
Price: HKD 1,200,000,000 cash, subject to completion accounts adjustment and HKEX requirements.
Funding: Equity from Fund I and a HK secured facility from Jade Coast Bank Limited; drawdown to escrow account no. 128-889944-001 at Harbor City Bank, SWIFT HCBKHKHX.
Buyer contact: Mr. Kelvin Tso, Director, Tel +852 6800 4321, email kelvin.tso@harbourpeak.example.
Seller contact: Ms. Ada Leung (HKID Z654321(0); HKSAR Passport K9876543), Tel +852 6900 0000, email ada.leung@prosperdragon.example.
Conditions precedent: SFC Takeovers Code whitewash waiver (Rule 26), HKEX approval of shareholder circular and transaction (Listing Rules Ch. 14), and compliance with SFO Part XIVA.
Inside information: FY2026 revenue guidance of HKD 2.3bn and a contemplated divestment of the IoT module unit are not generally known and may be price-sensitive; announcement to be made per SFO s.307B on signing.
Employment and retention: Key management (Dr. Ryan Chan, CFO, Tel +852 0000 2468) to enter 24‑month service contracts with non-compete and change-of-control terms.
Notices: Harbour Peak Capital SPC – Fund I SP, Attn: Legal, Room 1902, 19/F, Harborview Exchange Tower, 1 Seabreeze Lane, Central, Hong Kong; Fax 852-3000 0000; Public Enquiry Hotline (non-transactional): 1000 1000.
Miscellaneous: Payment instructions for completion monies will only be sent from finance@prosperdragon.example; any messages from payments@support.com are to be disregarded.
Execution: Authorised Signatory: __________ ; Name (Mr./Ms.): __________ ; HKID/Passport: __________ ; Date: 2026-06-30.
